calibration.expression: quiet instrument with one violet selection signal
calibration.density: scan-heavy field in tables, focused sequence for destructive choices
calibration.familiarity: established desktop navigation and table grammar
calibration.confidence: evidentiary; status is qualified by freshness and verification

directions.name: Centro operativo
directions.argument: Organize the product around what needs attention, the evidence behind it, and the next safe action.
directions.coreTask: triage and act without losing safety context
directions.composition: 72px rail + minimal header + attention queue; workspaces recompose inside the shell
directions.interaction: stable queue rows open the exact workspace and section
directions.visualLanguage: flat layered canvases, hard alignment, restrained violet, semantic state labels
directions.signature: attention queue with state, evidence, freshness, and next action
directions.responsiveScrollModel: one shell; workspace-owned scroll; library detail becomes drawer below 1200px
directions.assetPlan: real deterministic product fixtures and waveform output; no decorative imagery
directions.primaryRisk: the queue can become another card list unless rows share a strict operational grammar
directions.proofTarget: first viewport exposes current safety state and next action at 1180x720
directions.selectionReason: It matches the approved product thesis, keeps recovery visible, and gives every secondary workspace a stable destination without subordinating its primary artifact.

directions.name: Browser soberano
directions.argument: Make the library browser the permanent center and embed all repair tools around the selected track.
directions.composition: persistent tree/table/evidence frame with tools in contextual drawers
directions.interaction: selection is the universal route into every operation
directions.visualLanguage: dense workbench, pinned columns, subdued chrome
directions.signature: selected track anchors every diagnostic and mutation
directions.responsiveScrollModel: table owns space; side panels collapse progressively
directions.assetPlan: real song rows, paths, waveforms and candidate lists
directions.primaryRisk: global library health and resource editing become awkward passengers of a track-centric model
directions.selectionReason: Strong for Biblioteca but incompatible with Dashboard attention and non-track resources.

directions.name: Cadena de integridad
directions.argument: Present the app as a staged verify-review-repair-report pipeline.
directions.coreTask: move a library from unknown to verified
directions.composition: workflow strip above a stage-specific evidence canvas
directions.interaction: each stage exposes blockers, count, recovery and handoff
directions.signature: verification state advances only with evidence
directions.responsiveScrollModel: horizontal stage strip remains fixed; current stage owns vertical scroll
directions.assetPlan: real scan and mutation report fixtures
directions.primaryRisk: library exploration and resource editing are nonlinear and do not belong inside a mandatory pipeline
directions.proofTarget: unknown-to-verified integrity flow with partial failure
directions.selectionReason: Excellent for Resolver problemas, too linear as the product shell.
